picks.quote: Shane is going to be the pick. I do like that the pricing is relatively even, but there's a couple of other people that I'm far more confident in
I think Loana does win this fight. I think he does find a finish. I like Loana here.
I am going to pick Luana Santos here, but I'm not going to put her in my lineup. I don't trust her that much.
I do think Michael wins. I don't necessarily think he's going to score these points because Gastón's relatively tough
I think Mitch can win this fight. I like him at $7,400. I think he gets his hands going.
Bea Malecki is the pick. She should win. She should dominate.
Magomed I was going to be the pick. I think he gets the takedowns. I think he gets them relatively early, and I think he can finish Melsik Baghdasaryan.
So, I think Andre Lima gets the win. I don't know if I'm going to put the money on Andre Lima in the DraftKings fantasy lineup
So, I see C-Rod winning this fight. And I think he can score okay.
Lock Dog is going to be the pick. I'll put him in my lineup because of how hard that guy works.
So, I think Navaho wins this fight, but I think he wins this fight by having nasty footwork and long rangy strikes.
I think Kyoji wins this fight. I think he can score well... I think Kyoji Horoguchi wins this fight.
